name: WmiEvent - WmiEventFilter activity detected
definition: Sysmon Event ID 19 records WmiEvent - WmiEventFilter activity detected.
trigger_scenarios: The event is emitted when the configured Sysmon operation occurs.

key_fields.explanation: EventNamespace root\\subscription with a new Name and Query such as SELECT * FROM __InstanceCreationEvent is WMI event-filter persistence.
Use the initiating image and ProcessGuid to join Event ID 1 command-line context.
Use the timestamp to correlate with related activity.

false_positives: Approved administration, management agents, and deployment tools can generate this telemetry.
Baseline expected hosts, signed binaries, and change windows before suppression.

attck_mapping.technique_name: Event Triggered Execution: Windows Management Instrumentation Event Subscription

detection_notes: EventNamespace root\\subscription with a new Name and Query such as SELECT * FROM __InstanceCreationEvent is WMI event-filter persistence. This is a T1546.003 Event Triggered Execution: Windows Management Instrumentation Event Subscription signal; preserve the concrete value and correlate the initiating Image, ProcessGuid, and logon context before closing.  Correlate new filters and consumers in a window=60 minute interval.
kql_snippet:
Sysmon
| where EventID == 19
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Image, ProcessGuid
spl_snippet: index=sysmon EventCode=19 | table _time, host, Image, ProcessGuid
